name: code-simplifier
description: Evaluations for code-simplifier skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-simplify
evals.description: Skill should trigger on requests to simplify or clean up code

prompts.input: Simplify this code while keeping the same behavior
prompts.reason: Direct request to simplify code preserving functionality

prompts.input: This function is too complex, can you refactor it for clarity?
prompts.reason: Refactor for clarity matches skill purpose

prompts.input: Clean up the recently modified code and reduce nesting
prompts.reason: Clean up with reduced nesting matches skill's enhance clarity goal

prompts.input: The code I just wrote has too many nested ternary operators, please improve readability
prompts.reason: Nested ternary issue is explicitly called out in skill

prompts.input: Remove redundant abstractions and consolidate this logic
prompts.reason: Removing redundant abstractions matches skill's simplification approach

evals.name: trigger-negative-unrelated
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for requests that are not about simplifying code

prompts.input: Add a new feature to this module
prompts.reason: Adding features, not simplifying existing code

prompts.input: Write unit tests for this function
prompts.reason: Test writing task, not code simplification
